description: Agent-first MCP server for WeChat Mini Program debugging & automation via WeChat DevTools.
name: io.github.Chaixueyuan/weapp-agent-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Automation WebSocket endpoint of an already-running WeChat DevTools instance (e.g. ws://localhost:9420). Recommended for the 'connect' flow — open DevTools manually, enable automation in Settings → Security → Service Port, then point the server here.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_WS_ENDPOINT

environmentVariables.description: Force 'launch' or 'connect' mode. Defaults to 'launch' unless WEAPP_WS_ENDPOINT is set.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_AUTOMATOR_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Path to the Mini Program project directory. Required when using 'launch' mode (the MCP server starts DevTools itself).
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_PROJECT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the WeChat DevTools CLI binary path (e.g. /Applications/wechatwebdevtools.app/Contents/MacOS/cli on macOS).
environmentVariables.name: WECHAT_DEVTOOLS_CLI_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Automation websocket port passed to 'cli auto --auto-port' in launch mode (default 9420).
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_DEVTOOLS_PORT
